blocks: Professional Profile for Merit Website – Mr. Arvind Kumar
Founder, Merit Launchers

Mr. Arvind Kumar is a distinguished education leader and former Regional Director of Education with the Directorate of Education, GNCT of Delhi, bringing over 36 years of extensive experience across teaching, school leadership, and educational governance. Renowned for his administrative acumen, policy expertise, and commitment to excellence, he has consistently contributed to strengthening institutional frameworks, improving academic outcomes, and ensuring regulatory compliance across multiple districts in Delhi.

A consistent first-division achiever and a rare two-time UPSC qualifier (for the roles of Principal and Deputy Director of Education), Mr. Kumar has demonstrated exceptional perseverance and competence throughout his career. From shaping young minds as a Physics educator to leading large administrative units as Regional Director, his journey reflects a seamless blend of academic depth and strategic leadership.

His core strengths lie in navigating complex educational systems, handling sensitive administrative and legal matters, and driving performance through structured governance. Even post-retirement, he continues to actively contribute as an advisor, inquiry officer, and expert in educational administration.
Key Attributes & Strengths:
Strategic Education Leader with 36+ years of progressive experience across teaching, leadership, and policy implementation
Two-Time UPSC Qualifier, reflecting exceptional academic rigor and competitive excellence
Expert in Educational Governance, including Delhi School Education Act, RTE Act, CCS/CCA Rules, and service regulations
Proven Administrative Head, having led multiple districts and large-scale education systems effectively
Specialist in Vigilance & Disciplinary Proceedings, handling complex inquiries, complaints, and legal cases with high success rates
Strong Legal & Compliance Acumen, with extensive experience in court matters, tribunals, and regulatory frameworks
Curriculum & Academic Excellence Champion, contributing to improved CBSE results and institutional performance
Global Exposure, with leadership training at the University of Cambridge and accreditation expertise via Quality Council of India
Versatile Educator & Mentor, with experience across Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan and reputed residential schools
Trusted Advisor Post-Retirement, supporting recruitment, policy guidance, and institutional decision-making
With a rare combination of administrative depth, academic excellence, and ethical leadership, Mr. Arvind Kumar continues to be a valuable force in shaping and guiding the education ecosystem.

Message from the desk of Mr Arvind Kumar (Founder, Merit Launchers)
Founder’s Story – From a Remote Village to a Mission for Millions

I was not born into privilege.
I come from a small, remote village in Saharanpur, Uttar Pradesh—a place where, during my childhood, there were no proper roads, no access to quality schools, no coaching institutes, and no exposure to competitive opportunities. Education was not a clear pathway; it was a daily struggle.
But what I witnessed growing up shaped my life forever.

It was not a lack of talent.
It was a lack of opportunity.

I saw bright, hardworking children—full of dreams and potential—forced to give up on their aspirations. Many who could have become doctors, engineers, or civil servants are today pulling rickshaws, working as daily wage earners, or still confined to the same circumstances they were born into.

Not because they lacked ability…
But because they never got a fair chance.
That reality stayed with me.

With determination, discipline, and the right guidance at crucial moments, I carved my own path in education. Over the next 36 years, I served in the education system, qualified UPSC twice, and eventually retired as Regional Director of Education, Government of NCT of Delhi.
Yet, even after reaching a position of influence, one question never left my mind:
“What about the millions of students who are still where I once was?”

The truth is harsh but real—quality coaching and competitive exam preparation in India has become expensive and inaccessible for a large section of society. Countless talented students are left behind—not because they are less capable, but because they lack the right guidance, exposure, and consistent practice.
That is why I founded Merit Launchers.
Merit Launchers is not just a platform—it is a purpose-driven mission.
To bridge the gap between talent and opportunity
To make high-quality preparation accessible and affordable
To empower students with the right practice, assessment, and improvement tools
To ensure that no dream is denied due to financial limitations
Whether a student is preparing for CUET, CLAT, SSC, CTET, or other competitive exams, our focus is simple—build confidence through consistent practice and help them compete with the best.
I firmly believe:
“Talent is everywhere, but opportunity is not.”
Through Merit Launchers, I am committed to changing this reality.

Because if even one student from a small village, just like mine, can rise, compete, and succeed—
then this journey will truly be meaningful.

— Arvind Kumar
Founder, Merit Launchers
Former Regional Director of Education (GNCT of Delhi)
Professional Profile for Merit Website – Mr. Diwaker Saraswati Chandra
Director – Capability Development & Marketing Strategy

Mr. Diwaker Saraswati Chandra is a seasoned Transformational Capability Development Coach and strategic leader with over three decades of rich experience in Learning & Development (L&D). As the Director – Capability Development & Marketing Strategy at Merit Launchers, he brings a unique blend of behavioural science, strategic thinking, and market insight to design impactful learning ecosystems that empower students, educators, and institutions alike.

With a deep-rooted belief that “Knowing is nothing until the ability of doing it is within,” Mr. Chandra has consistently focused on bridging the gap between knowledge and execution. His approach goes beyond traditional training—he emphasizes real transformation by enabling individuals to build practical skills, confidence, and performance-oriented mindsets.

Over the years, he has played a pivotal role in designing and delivering high-impact capability-building initiatives that have enhanced productivity and driven behavioural transformation across trainers, business leaders, and learning communities. His expertise lies in creating end-to-end learning journeys—from Training Needs Assessment to execution, reinforcement, and measurable outcomes—ensuring that learning is not just delivered but truly absorbed and applied.

An accomplished author of the Amazon bestselling book The Trainer’s Blueprint, Mr. Chandra is widely recognized for his ability to simplify complex concepts into actionable frameworks. His learning philosophy—SARAL (Simple), SPASHT (Clear), and SATIK (Precise)—has made his programs highly relatable, practical, and impactful across diverse audiences.

At Merit Launchers, he is instrumental in shaping capability development strategies and aligning them with market needs, ensuring that students preparing for competitive exams receive not just content, but the right direction, discipline, and practice framework to succeed.
Key Attributes & Achievements:

Transformational L&D Leader:
Over 30+ years of experience in designing and delivering high-impact learning interventions focused on capability building and productivity enhancement

Architect of End-to-End Learning Ecosystems:
Expertise in Training Needs Assessment, content design, group coaching, and execution—creating holistic and outcome-driven learning journeys

Creator of 150+ Signature Programs:
Conceptualized and delivered programs on Leadership Development, Customer Centricity, Train the Trainer, and Positive Relationship frameworks across industries

Coach to 2700+ Professionals:
Empowered over 1800 trainers and 900 business leaders in the last five years, driving measurable transformation in skills, mindset, and performance

Visionary Community Builder & Strategist:
Founder of Deal Training Solutions and Digital Gurukul, and a key force behind The Trainers Camp—a thriving learning community impacting over 13,000 professionals nationwide

A multilingual facilitator with a natural and engaging delivery style, Mr. Chandra connects effortlessly with diverse audiences, making learning both meaningful and actionable. His ability to blend strategy with human connection makes him a driving force behind Merit Launchers’ mission—to democratize quality learning and unlock the true potential of every learner.
Message from the Desk of Mr. Diwaker Saraswati Chandra
At Merit Launchers, we believe that success in competitive exams is not a matter of chance—it is a result of clarity, strategy, discipline, and transformation.

Through years of working with learners, educators, and institutions, one truth has become evident within me:
Hard work alone is not enough. What truly matters is structured, intelligent, and consistent effort.

This belief led me to create of the MERIT Exam Compass—a 5-frame strategic model designed to guide every aspirant from preparation to transformation through a cyclical journey of Measure, Explore, Rework, Implement, and Transform.
Each cycle of MERIT Exam Compass has been instrumental in:
Improves accuracy
Enhances confidence
Sharpens strategy
This is not just a framework—it is a mindset, a system, and a commitment to excellence.
The 3 Pillars Embedded in MERIT Exam Compass:
Cognitive Mastery (Knowledge & Concepts)
Behavioral Discipline (Habits & Consistency)
Emotional Resilience (Mindset & Pressure Handling)
Message for Students – Your Journey from Aspirant to Achiever

Dear Students,
Your dreams are valid, and your potential is limitless—but success demands more than just studying harder. It demands studying smarter and evolving continuously.
The MERIT Compass empowers you to:
Measure where you stand with honesty and clarity
Explore the smartest strategies tailored to your strengths
Rework your mistakes into powerful learning opportunities
Implement with discipline, consistency, and focus
Transform into a confident, exam-ready performer

Your Responsibility: Take ownership of your preparation, stay consistent, and trust the process.
Your Gain (WIFM): Clarity in direction, improved accuracy, stronger confidence, and a real competitive edge.
Remember: You don’t just clear exams—you become capable of winning in life.
Message for Parents – Your Role as Enablers of Potential

Dear Parents,
Behind every successful student stands a pillar of support, belief, and emotional strength. Your role is not just to guide—but to create an environment where your child can thrive without fear.
The MERIT Compass helps your child move from confusion to confidence through a structured approach. But your encouragement is what fuels their consistency.
Your Responsibility:
Encourage effort over pressure
Support disciplined routines
Trust the process rather than chasing shortcuts

Your Gain (WIFM):
A confident, self-driven child who develops not just academic success, but lifelong discipline, resilience, and clarity.
Your belief can turn their preparation into transformation.
Message for Institutional Partners – Building a Culture of Performance Excellence
Dear Institutional Partners,
In today’s competitive landscape, institutions are not just centres of learning—they are ecosystems of performance and transformation.
The MERIT Exam Compass offers a structured, scalable, and outcome-driven model to enhance student success by embedding:
Cognitive Mastery (conceptual clarity)
Behavioral Discipline (consistent habits)
Emotional Resilience (exam temperament)

Your Responsibility:
Integrate structured preparation systems, enable data-driven tracking, and foster a culture of continuous improvement.
Your Gain (WIFM):
Improved student outcomes and success ratios
Stronger institutional credibility and brand trust
A differentiated positioning as a results-driven learning partner
Final Thoughts
From KASH to KHASS – The Missing Link to Success

In the journey of success, we often focus on building KASH—
Knowledge, Attitude, Skills, and Habits.
Knowledge gives you understanding
Attitude shapes your mindset
Skills enable execution
Habits build consistency

Together, KASH builds confidence.
But here’s the truth most students overlook:
Confidence alone does not guarantee success.

Many students have knowledge.
Many have the right attitude.
Many work hard and build good habits.
Yet, they fall short when it matters the most.
Why?
Because something critical is missing— STRATEGY.
Introducing KHASS – The Complete Success Formula
When you add Strategy to KASH, it becomes KHASS:
K – Knowledge
H – Habit
A – Attitude
S – Skill
S – Strategy
Strategy is what transforms effort into results.
It is the difference between:
Studying hard vs. studying smart
Being busy vs. being productive
Attempting exams vs. cracking exams
Why Strategy Makes You “KHASS” (Special)
Strategy helps you:
Decide what to study, what to skip, and when to revise
Focus on high-impact areas instead of scattered efforts
Convert mistakes into learning and improvement cycles
Manage time, pressure, and performance during exams

Without strategy, effort gets diluted.
With strategy, effort gets multiplied.
The Reality Check

Two students may study for the same number of hours…
But the one with the right strategy will always move ahead.

Because success is not about doing more—
It’s about doing what matters most, in the right way, at the right time.
“KASH builds your foundation, but KHASS builds your success.”

So don’t just prepare harder—
Prepare smarter, with the strategy of Merit Launchers at the core.

Because the future belongs not just to those who work hard…
But to those who think, plan, and execute with precision.

At Merit Launchers, our mission is simple yet powerful—
To ensure that every learner, regardless of background, gets a fair opportunity to succeed.

Let us not just prepare for exams—
Let us prepare for excellence.
Wish your success with strategy

— Diwaker Saraswati Chandra
Director – Capability Development & Marketing Strategy
